overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from under an elevated highway past neon-lit storefronts and digital billboards, ascending through narrow passages and open plazas. The atmosphere is dense with yellow fog and illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements.

events.description: military armored transport vehicle drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure while looking up at surrounding skyscrapers and billboards

notable_agents.action: military transport vehicle driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward through the covered area, looking up at towering skyscrapers piercing through the yellow fog. A military transport vehicle passes through the intersection ahead, and holographic traffic signs float near the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past neon storefronts and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person with glowing orange umbrella walking toward camera
person sitting on bench under palm tree

entered.detail: food stall with bright purple neon lighting and japanese signage
tropical palm tree lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the open sidewalk, the scene is dominated by a bright purple neon ramen shop on the right. The wet concrete reflects the colorful lights from surrounding advertisements. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the path, and the CANT BREATHE billboard remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian stairway between high-rise buildings

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs into narrower upper level passage

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs between tall buildings toward an upper level walkway

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella ascending stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward between buildings
large vertical screen showing character in red jacket

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow passage as the camera begins ascending a concrete stairway. A large digital billboard displaying a character in a red jacket dominates the view ahead. The space becomes enclosed by tall building walls on both sides, creating a canyon-like effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open plaza with palm tree planters

events.description: emerges from narrow passage into open plaza area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza area with palm trees and concrete planters

entered.detail: sunken plaza area with concrete surfaces and scattered debris
large planter containing palm trees in the plaza center
large screen showing two characters side by side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow stairway, the scene opens into a wide plaza with palm trees in concrete planters. The space is more open with visible sky above, though still surrounded by towering buildings. Large digital billboards continue to illuminate the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertising screens

events.description: begins ascending final set of stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: walking along street lined with digital billboards then ascending final stairs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking up stairs ahead

entered.detail: vertical advertising screen with EL GUAPO text and snake logo
building with red illuminated windows and japanese architectural elements

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along a street lined with more digital advertising, including a prominent EL GUAPO billboard. The camera approaches and begins ascending a final set of concrete stairs, following other pedestrians upward between the red-lit building on the right and glass structures on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway into a vibrant, neon-lit urban corridor that eventually narrows into a towering concrete canyon. It begins beneath a massive highway structure, moving forward through a yellow fog where towering skyscrapers loom overhead and a military transport vehicle crosses the intersection. As the camera emerges onto an open sidewalk, the environment brightens with the purple glow of a ramen shop and the reflections of colorful advertisements on wet concrete, while pedestrians with umbrellas pass by. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed space as the camera ascends a concrete stairway, moving toward a large digital billboard of a character in a red jacket. Finally, the view is framed by tall building walls on both sides, creating a claustrophobic ascent through the city's dense architecture.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stairway into an expansive urban plaza before ascending toward a final elevated vantage point. It begins by emerging from a narrow passage into a wide open space where palm trees in concrete planters stand beneath a visible sky and towering buildings. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza gives way to a street lined with vibrant digital advertising, including a prominent EL GUAPO billboard that cuts through the yellow fog. The scene then shifts toward a final set of concrete stairs, following other pedestrians upward between a red-lit building and sleek glass structures.
